heading: Repayment of student loan on behalf of employee
label: 610 Repayment of student loan on behalf of employee
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Congressional Operations Appropriations Act, 2002, which is title I of the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2002, and not as part of title II of the Congressional Budget and Impoundment Control Act of 1974 which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Director of the Congressional Budget Office may, in order to recruit or retain qualified personnel, establish and maintain on and after , a program under which the Office may agree to repay (by direct payments on behalf of the employee) all or a portion of any student loan previously taken out by such employee.November 12, 2001

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: b Regulations
children.text: The Director may, by regulation, make applicable such provisions of as the Director determines necessary to provide for such program.section 5379 of title 5
$6,000 for any employee in any calendar year; or
a total of $40,000 in the case of any employee.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: d Limitation
children.text: The Office may not reimburse an employee for any repayments made by such employee prior to the Office entering into an agreement under this section with such employee.

children.heading: Accounting
children.label: e Accounting
children.text: Any amount repaid by, or recovered from, an individual under this section and its implementing regulations shall be credited to the appropriation account available for salaries and expenses of the Office at the time of repayment or recovery.

children.heading: Applicability
children.label: f Applicability
children.text: This section shall apply to fiscal year 2002 and each fiscal year thereafter.
